title: genista ferox var. tamarrutii
intro: Genista ferox var. tamarrutii, also known as Tamamrash or Devil's Bean, is a type of shrub native to the Mediterranean region. It contains compounds such as flavonoids and alkaloids, which have been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, and is also believed to have antiseptic and antibacterial properties. In herbal medicine, Genista ferox var. tamarrutii is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is also used in the form of tinctures or extracts to harness its medicinal benefits.
